cost.title: Calculate landed cost with confidence
cost.description: Shipping + customs + tax in one quick calculator — no paperwork, no guessing.

catalog.title: Turn your catalog into products in one tap
catalog.description: Upload your catalog file and let AI extract the products for you.

tracking.title: Track your deals and shipments
tracking.description: Every request, quote, and shipment in one place, updated live.

discover.title: Discover verified suppliers
discover.description: Browse the global marketplace and see real products from verified factories.

rfq.title: Request a quote easily
rfq.description: Describe what you need in one simple sentence, and let your agent prepare a quote.

tracking.title: Track your order all the way to Aqaba
tracking.description: From signing to arrival, always know exactly where your order is.

navIntro.title: This is your work hub
navIntro.description: Everything you need lives in this sidebar — let's walk through the essentials.

calculator.title: Quick Calculator
calculator.description: Calculate the landed cost of any product in seconds, no need for a full quote request.

calculatorQuantity.title: Enter the quantity
calculatorQuantity.description: How many units does the client want to buy of this product?

calculatorPrice.title: Enter the unit price
calculatorPrice.description: The price per unit in Chinese Yuan (CNY), as agreed with the factory.

calculatorSubmit.title: Calculate the landed cost
calculatorSubmit.description: Tap here and the system will work out shipping, customs, and tax automatically in seconds.

calculatorResult.title: That's your first landed cost! 🎉
calculatorResult.description: This is the final total your client pays — ready to share or turn into a full quote.

upload.title: Upload your catalog
upload.description: Upload a file or product photos and the system extracts the data automatically for you to review later.

inbox.title: Incoming client requests
inbox.description: Importer requests land here so you can prepare quotes quickly.

tracking.title: Shipment tracking
tracking.description: Follow every shipment from China until it reaches your client.

chatProfile.title: Messages and your profile
chatProfile.description: Chat with your clients from here, and manage your account from your profile.

navIntro.title: This is your home screen
navIntro.description: Everything you need lives in this sidebar — let's walk through the essentials.

marketplace.title: Global Marketplace
marketplace.description: Browse real products from verified suppliers before requesting a quote.

rfq.title: Request a new quote
rfq.description: Describe what you need in one simple sentence, and we'll route it to the right agent.

rfqProductName.title: Describe the product
rfqProductName.description: Write the product name clearly so the agent understands it right away.

rfqQuantity.title: Set the quantity
rfqQuantity.description: How many units do you need? This number is essential for an accurate quote.

rfqSubmit.title: Send your first request! 🎉
rfqSubmit.description: Tap here to send it — a real quote from an agent will be on its way shortly.

myRequests.title: My Requests
myRequests.description: Track all your requests and the quotes you've received in one place.

tracking.title: Shipment tracking
tracking.description: Once your order is confirmed, follow it step by step until it arrives.

chat.title: Messages
chat.description: Talk directly with your agent for any question or clarification.

navGuard.message: Looks like you wandered off the tour!

completion.title: Tour complete 🎉
completion.subtitle: You're all set to use the platform with confidence. You can restart the tour anytime from Settings.
